learningObjectives: Fix common typing and pointer problems

plainEnglishDefinitions.plain: A key that makes letters uppercase.
A device connected to the computer like a mouse or keyboard.

realJobUses: Recover input devices during first-line support
analogies: Peripherals are the tools your hands use to talk to the computer.
handsOnTasks: Reconnect a mouse and verify pointer movement
breakFixTasks: Replace mouse battery or reconnect keyboard
automationOpportunities: Manual hardware checks come before automation.
